# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers file-scoped namespaces (namespace X;) and public classes by default in new C# files.
- User is frustrated that new C# files keep being generated with auto-generated using statements (System, System.Collections.Generic, System.Linq, System.Text, System.Threading.Tasks) and internal classes. They want no auto-generated usings and public classes by default.
